Call ID: EXT-006
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-25
Topic: Adoption & Onboarding
Participants: Liam (account manager); Marcus (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Liam): Hi Marcus, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Marcus): Our new hires are struggling to get onboarded to the tool.
AM (Liam): Let's look at the usage data and find where people drop off.
Customer (Marcus): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Liam): We have an onboarding track that could help your new hires ramp faster.
Customer (Marcus): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Liam): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
